overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a modern waterfront plaza featuring a large monument statue, transitioning into a contemporary office interior. The player character moves from an outdoor plaza with the 'Sevazi Dunes' statue, along a wooden deck with city views, into an office building with 'FORGE' branded monitors and whiteboard diagrams.

events.description: begins circling around the statue base while looking up at the monument
approaches plaque at statue base revealing 'SEVAZI DUNES' inscription

agents.ego_description: circling around the large silver and gold robed statue, examining it from various angles and looking up at the figure holding a sphere

entered.detail: large silver and gold robed figure holding a sphere on an ornate pedestal with gold lattice base
modern building with triangular glass roof sections and metallic framework
distant modern skyscrapers visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view looking up at the imposing Sevazi Dunes statue, a silver and gold robed figure holding a sphere. The player circles the monument base on a paved plaza, revealing the modern glass architecture surrounding the plaza and a distant city skyline across the water.

events.description: moves from statue plaza onto elevated wooden waterfront deck
turns left along the waterfront revealing a docked yacht and expansive city skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden deck pathway, passing outdoor benches and approaching the office building entrance

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with metal railings overlooking the water
large white multi-level yacht docked at the pier with city skyline behind
white rectangular table with chess pieces set up outside the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the statue behind, the player moves onto a wooden waterfront deck with metal railings. The path reveals a luxury yacht docked to the right and panoramic views of the distant city skyline across the water. The player approaches the modern glass office building entrance where an outdoor chess table sits on the deck.

events.description: enters the office building through glass doors leaving the waterfront deck
transitions from bright natural outdoor light to interior artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: entering the office building through the glass entrance and moving into the cubicle workspace area

entered.detail: black modern reception counter with glass doors and office signage in Japanese characters
curved white office cubicles with partitioned desks and computer setups
computer monitors displaying the 'FORGE' logo on orange and white backgrounds

segments.scene_description: The player enters the modern office building through glass doors, transitioning from the bright waterfront to a shaded interior. Inside, the space features curved white cubicle workstations with monitors prominently displaying the 'FORGE' logo. The reception area leads into an open office layout with orange accent walls.

events.description: turns toward the corner whiteboard area of the office
approaches whiteboards covered in hand-drawn diagrams, charts, and notes

agents.ego_description: moving through the cubicle area toward the whiteboards, examining the diagrams and office layout

entered.detail: whiteboards with hand-drawn charts, graphs, flowcharts, and notes in various colored markers
wall with geometric orange paint patterns and peeling sections

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the office interior, the player explores the cubicle workspace and approaches a corner with large whiteboards covered in detailed diagrams and charts. The office features distinctive orange accent walls with geometric patterns, and the FORGE monitors are now visible in the background as the player focuses on the planning boards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a grand outdoor waterfront plaza into the structured interior of a modern corporate office. It begins by circling the imposing silver and gold Sevazi Dunes statue, where the camera captures the surrounding glass architecture and a distant city skyline across the water. As the camera leaves the monument, the scene shifts onto a wooden waterfront deck featuring a docked luxury yacht and an outdoor chess table before approaching the building's glass entrance. The perspective then transitions from the bright exterior into a shaded office interior, moving past curved white workstations with FORGE branded monitors and orange accent walls. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the workspace, moving away from the reception area to focus on large whiteboards covered in detailed diagrams and charts.
